name: Monkey D. Luffy
desc: [On Play] Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −3000 Power.

name: CP9
desc: [Blocker] Rest this Character to change the target of an attack.

name: Mr.2
desc: [Activate: Main] Once per turn, place 1 card from your hand at the bottom of your deck.

name: Nami
desc: [On Play] Draw 1 card. You may then place 1 card from your hand at the bottom of your deck.

name: Gear 5
desc: [Counter] Up to 1 of your Leader or Characters gains +4000 Power during this battle.

name: Thousand Sunny
desc: [Activate: Main] Once per turn, rest this Stage to give one of your Characters +1000 Power.

name: Tony Tony Chopper
desc: [On Play] Look at top 3 cards, reveal up to 1 Character card and add it to your hand.

name: Nico Robin
desc: [On Play] You may trash 1 card from your hand to draw 2 cards.

name: Usopp
desc: [On Play] Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −1000 Power until your next turn.

name: Sanji
desc: [Rush] This Character can attack on the turn it is played.

name: Buster Call
desc: [Main] K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with 4000 Power or less.
